title: melica harfordii
intro: Melica harfordii, also known as Harford's melica, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower fever and alleviate pain. The roots and leaves of Melica harfordii have been traditionally used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including colds, sore throats, and skin irritations. In traditional medicine, Melica harfordii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its health benefits are said to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
